name: Indian Keema with Ginger
recipeIngredient: 2 Hot green chilies, seeded and chopped
1 lb Lean ground beef or lamb
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat and add the onions. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes, or until the onions are browned.
2. Add the garlic, ginger, and chilies to the pan. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Increase the heat to high and add the ground meat. Break up any lumps with a spatula, using gentle pressure, and cook, stirring constantly until the meat begins to brown.
4. Sprinkle the turmeric and salt over the mixture and stir well to combine.
5. Add the boiling water and cover the pan. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 25 minutes, stirring often to prevent sticking.
6. If any liquid remains after 25 minutes, uncover the pan and continue cooking until it is completely evaporated.
7. Stir in the garam masala, lemon juice, and chopped coriander or parsley. Serve hot with rice or naan.
